channel.title: Client-Spider on ZAP
channel.description: Recent content in Client-Spider on ZAP

item.title: Automating OWASP PTK with ZAP (Phase 1)
item.description: ZAP’s Automation Framework can now drive OWASP PTK scans using the Client Spider. This is an early release - we want you to try it and give us feedback while we work toward deeper integration with ZAP’s active and passive scan engines.
